rules: Do not import a full AI effect screenshot as one prefab background.
Keep TMP/Button/Slider/script-driven dynamic content in Unity; do not bake dynamic text into slices.
Only rows marked allowCreateOrRename may create a new Image container.
Prefer replacing existing Image.sprite or RawImage.texture on matched nodes.

entries.backflowMode: 切透明 PNG，建议九宫格 Sprite，Image Type=Sliced
entries.textPolicy: 静态装饰可烘焙；动态数字/昵称/状态不要烘焙
entries.backflowStrategy: 当前 prefab 未发现同名 m_Name。回流时可在最近的稳定父节点下新增或改名为该施工目标的 Image 容器，再按本表坐标设置 RectTransform；不要替换 TMP、Button 或脚本绑定对象。

entries.backflowMode: 保留 TMP/按钮文字动态层；只切底板、图标或装饰
entries.textPolicy: 文字不烘焙进切图，继续由 TMP/脚本字段驱动
entries.backflowStrategy: 在对应现有节点上替换 Image.sprite / RawImage.texture；保留其子级 TMP、Button、脚本引用和显隐逻辑。

entries.backflowMode: 保留 TMP/按钮文字动态层；只切底板、图标或装饰
